Slider.customization: h-12 thumb-h-6 thumb-w-6 track-h-2 bg-[#1A1A26] text-[#E8FF47]

BottomNav.style: bg-[#0A0A0F] border-t border-[#2A2A3A] z-50 flex justify-around items-center h-20 pb-safe

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. FONTS: Add the Google Fonts link to public/index.html immediately.
2. TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js with the custom colors exactly as defined. Do not use default slate/zinc.
3. BASE STYLES: In index.css, set body { background-color: #0A0A0F; color: #F0F0F5; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; }.
4. COMPONENTS: When using Shadcn, override the default radius to '0.5rem' or '0.3rem' for a sharper athletic look.
5. CHARTS: Use Recharts. For the Radar Chart, ensure the grid is visible (stroke='#2A2A3A') and the data polygon is filled with Primary color (#E8FF47) at 50% opacity.
6. MOBILE: Ensure the bottom navigation bar is fixed and has a high z-index. Add padding-bottom to the main container so content isn't hidden behind the nav.
7. FORMS: Auto-save is a requirement. Implement debounced saving on inputs.
8. TIMER: The timer text must be HUGE (text-6xl or larger) using 'Space Grotesk' font.
9. ICONS: Use Lucide-react. Stroke width should be slightly bolder (2px) to match the athletic aesthetic.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Avoid generic 'AI slop' aesthetics. No gradients on backgrounds.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy, but keep borders subtle.
Use glass-morphism effects sparingly (only for sticky navs).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (transition: all).
You MUST NOT center align the app container text-align: center.
Always use modern button styles (sharp or slightly rounded, high contrast).
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters.
Use generous spacing (p-6, p-8) where possible to avoid clutter.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui.
All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
